creator: tobez@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

There is not enough information. 

"my perl scripts were not running properly" - 
can you describe this in more detail? 

"I reinstalled the perl modules after deinstalling the older version." - 
what exactly got deinstalled and reinstalled, which versions, with what 
possible options?  Was perl itself reinstalled?  Which versions? 

I could not find anything FreeBSD-related at the link you 
provided.  If there was a similar problem report, what was its number? 

Also, the complete minimal script that fails would be useful 
for debugging.
